title: VibeThinker: 3B param model that beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning with novel SFT+GRPO
summary: VibeThinker is a 3B parameter model that achieves superior reasoning performance compared to Opus 4.5 by combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The paper introduces a novel training approach that enhances reasoning capabilities in small models, challenging the assumption that larger models are necessary for complex tasks.
